product.name: ArShirt Moda Pro
product.familyDescriptorPl: Robocze modowe — stretch i polar, wielobrandowe
product.familyDescriptorEn: Fashion workwear — stretch and fleece, multi-brand
product.categorySourceGroup: High Visible Warp Knit Fabrics for Safety Jackets
product.titleDescriptor: 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Pique Flame Retardant Antistatic Fabric
product.specLine: 220 g/m², 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant
descriptions: Antistatic Pique Knit Fabric 60% modacrylic 38% cotton 2% carbon, inherent flame retardant antistatic knit fabric . ArShirt Moda Pro fabric are mostly used by welders, electrical workers and firefighters.
It is resistant to very high sun level, with fastness level of 6 to 7.
ArShirt Moda Pro are inherent flame retardant with EN 11612 certification.
Suitable for antistatic applications, certified for EN ISO 1149-5
It provides arc flash protection with EN 61482 class 1 (4 kA) certification.
60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Pique Flame Retardant Antistatic Fabric
220 g/m², 60% Modacrylic 38% Cotton 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Done | EN ISO 11612
